verse_text: For there is nothing covered that will not be revealed, nor hidden that will not be known.

links.context: The leaven of the Pharisees (v. 6) is their doctrine (v. 12) and their hypocrisy ([[LUK.12:2]]). The reason the disciples are painfully slow to understand is that they have such little faith (v. 8); they would not fully grasp Christ's teachings until Pentecost, when the Holy Spirit was given.
